---
title: "Data Inventory"
---

```{python}
#| echo: false
import sys
from pathlib import Path

# Add the python directory to the path
# When running from quarto/, go up to Analysis/, then into python/
python_dir = Path('../python').resolve()
if str(python_dir) not in sys.path:
    sys.path.insert(0, str(python_dir))
```

## Overview

This analysis visualizes Chinese development projects around the world using data from AidData's China's Global Loans and Grants Dataset, Version 1.0.

## Temporal Trends (2000-2023)

```{python}
from load_data import clg_dev
from plots import create_temporal_trends

# Create time series visualization
fig = create_temporal_trends(clg_dev)
fig.show(config={'modeBarButtonsToRemove': ['zoom2d', 'pan2d', 'select2d', 'lasso2d', 'zoomIn2d', 'zoomOut2d', 'autoScale2d', 'resetScale2d', 'toImage'], 'displaylogo': False, 'scrollZoom': False})
```

## Geographic Distribution of Projects

:::panel-tabset

### Total Projects
```{python}
from plots import create_flat_map_visualization

# Count unique projects by country
fig = create_flat_map_visualization(
    clg_dev,
    agg_col='AidData_Record_ID',
    agg_func='nunique',
    value_label='Number of Projects',
    color_scale='YlOrRd'
)
fig.show(config={'modeBarButtonsToRemove': ['lasso2d', 'select2d', 'resetGeo', 'toImage'], 'displaylogo': False})
```

### Total Funding (USD)
```{python}
# Sum of project amounts by country
# Color scale capped at $10B; Pakistan (top recipient) annotated as outlier
fig = create_flat_map_visualization(
    clg_dev,
    agg_col='Amount_Constant_USD_2023',
    agg_func='sum',
    value_label='Total USD (2023)',
    color_scale='Greens',
    zmax=10e9,
    outlier_countries={'Pakistan': (30.3752, 69.3451)}
)
fig.show(config={'modeBarButtonsToRemove': ['lasso2d', 'select2d', 'resetGeo', 'toImage'], 'displaylogo': False})
```

:::

## Public Opinion of China by Country

```{python}
from load_data import gpoc
from plots import create_public_opinion_map

fig = create_public_opinion_map(gpoc)
fig.show(config={'modeBarButtonsToRemove': ['lasso2d', 'select2d', 'resetGeo', 'toImage'], 'displaylogo': False})
```
